articles.title: Steamy Dating Site Ashley Madison Ditches Infidelity in Pursuit of Single Women

articles.title: Meta halts collaboration with Mercor following significant data breach
articles.description: Meta has suspended its partnership with data vendor Mercor after a security breach potentially compromised sensitive information related to AI model training. Major AI labs are now investigating the incident to assess the extent of the data exposure. This bre…
